task: Public FrankX subpage and download surface for Property Intelligence OS
audience: Rental property owners, real estate agencies, renter experience buyers, and implementation partners

keep: Human approval as a trust feature
avoid: Claims that the public kit contains private owner or renter data
Auto-commitment claims for pricing, leases, urgent repairs, or legal guidance
direction.signature: A real portal screenshot leads the page, then the business and agent architecture prove the template is installable and sellable.
direction.system: Dark premium product page, emerald/cyan signal accents, real product capture hero asset, compact cards, explicit architecture and launch gates.

asset_quality.why_premium: The hero visual is a real screenshot exported from the local Property Portal Template, showing the actual renter portal and owner dashboard direction instead of an abstract promise.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.notes: Tier A product capture is used as the primary hero evidence.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.notes: Desktop and mobile screenshots were opened and visually inspected.

checks.name: download-artifact
checks.notes: ZIP and SHA-256 checksum were regenerated in public/downloads after adding agent team, MCP/Railway architecture, install runbook, business model, data boundaries, and success gates.

checks.name: desktop-mobile-page-qa
checks.notes: System Chrome browser QA returned HTTP 200 on desktop and mobile, confirmed hero image, download CTA, architecture section, and checksum visibility.

checks.name: vercel-preview
checks.notes: Requires a clean preview deployment after the site gate passes and unrelated dirty work is isolated.

score.notes: Strong product proof, public download path, responsive first viewport, and browser-verified page assertions. Vercel preview remains the release boundary.
